title: ATTICUS_MPO context-cell upgrade merged baseline
content: PR #99 merged the first ATTICUS_MPO memory-engine context-cell upgrade into release-candidate. Stored memory cells now carry compact context-bearing fields, schema v9 persists those fields, and prompt-context injection now emits a bounded structured block containing scope, baseline, tags, summary, and finding.
context_summary: Durable merged milestone for the first MPO context-carrying memory-engine upgrade. This is now part of the active MPO baseline and should be treated as a continuity anchor for future sessions.
